MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Daniel Bornstein represented Plaintiff, Santa Fee Associates, Inc. and Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. represented Defendant, Mildred Walker. The case did not settle and the trial date is confirmed.
